description: The food.gdt dataset is open in Gretl, containing household survey data for 'food_exp' (weekly food expenditure in dollars) and 'income' (weekly income in $100 units) for 40 households. Compute descriptive summary statistics for all variables in the dataset and save the output as a text file to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/summary_stats.txt.

metadata.data_source: Hill, Griffiths, Lim - Principles of Econometrics 5th ed, household survey data
